name: ZombieCrash
description: Meet the new word in the world of zombie apocalypse! Destroy hordes of undead in our exciting 2D shooter. Join the battle and fight for survival in a crowd of zombies. Scores, competition with friends, and continuous attacks are all waiting for you in our game. Become the best zombie hunter and save the world from chaos! Dive into the action right now - for free and without limits!
instructions: - WASD or arrows - run - Left mouse button - shoot
tags: 1 Player, Action, apocalypse, Arcade, Arena, Avoid, Battle, Boys, Brawl, Bullet, Robot, Shooter, unity, Zombie
